mapper.select: SELECT j.id, j.employer_account, j.job_description, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.university_name, j.latitude, j.longitude, e.company_name FROM job j LEFT JOIN employer e ON j.employer_account = e.employer_account WHERE j.status = 1 AND (j.university_name IS NULL OR j.university_name = '') ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job ( employer_account, salary_min, salary_max, job_description, work_location, status, university_name, latitude, longitude ) VALUES ( #{employerAccount}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{jobDescription}, #{workLocation}, #{status}, #{universityName}, #{latitude}, #{longitude} )
mapper.update: UPDATE job SET employer_account = #{employerAccount}, salary_min = #{salaryMin}, salary_max = #{salaryMax}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, work_location = #{workLocation}, status = #{status}, university_name = #{universityName}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT j.id, j.employer_account, j.job_description, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.university_name, j.latitude, j.longitude, e.company_name FROM job j LEFT JOIN employer e ON j.employer_account = e.employer_account WHERE j.status = 1 AND j.latitude IS NOT NULL AND j.longitude IS NOT NULL AND j.latitude BETWEEN #{minLat} AND #{maxLat} AND j.longitude BETWEEN #{minLon} AND #{maxLon}
